description_long: This is a large, modern house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior is predominantly white, featuring expansive windows and multiple balconies with metal railings. The property includes a rectangular swimming pool at the rear and is surrounded by a well-manicured green lawn with several trees for landscaping. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper level set back in places to create terraces and outdoor living spaces. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with some large floor-to-ceiling panes and others grouped in smaller clusters. The main entryway is understated, likely featuring a simple door and minimal decorative elements.
description: A large, modern two-story house with a flat roof, white exterior, expansive windows, balconies, and a backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, a balcony above, and a tree to the left side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting a row of windows, several trees, and the pool extending from the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the pool, large glass windows, and a terrace area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more windows, a single tree, and the pool visible at the far end.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and grouped clusters
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main entry with minimal ornamentation, likely a flush door and no porch or columns
